nodes.label: Swarm Graph
nodes.summary: Mission Control's hero zone: a live node graph of the four agents with role-colored pulses, flowing edges and critic flag chips.

nodes.label: Trace River
nodes.summary: Mission Control's bottom zone: a live horizontal span waterfall of the current generation, color-coded by role, deep-linking to SigNoz.

nodes.label: Vitals Rail
nodes.summary: Mission Control's right rail: live token odometer, critic catch count, per-role model chips with FALLBACK badges, Swarm Doctor card and alert feed.

nodes.label: Mission Control design language
nodes.summary: design.md: the-observability-data-is-the-interface design system with role color tokens, telemetry-driven motion rules and flight-ops voice.
